items.change_summary_for_review: Manual sample change: EUR-Lex metadata or status presentation for Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 may have been updated (e.g. consolidation label, related-document links, or timeline display). This is a fictionalised example for schema testing—not an automated detection. Supports governance review to confirm whether internal AI system registers or compliance calendars need a refresh.
items.possible_impact: May affect controls related to regulatory tracking and evidence items such as AI system registers or governance memos if confirmed on the official source.
items.legal_safe_note: Manual sample record for data-model testing only. Not legal advice. Requires human review before client use. Does not confirm that any substantive legal text changed.
